omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
Cookies and similar technologies or third party tolls may use.
• We may collect data we receive if you link a third party tool with the Games
(such as Facebook or Google).
• We may collect data for advertising and analytics purposes, so we can provide
you a better game experience.

Cookies and similar technologies or third party tolls may use.
• We may collect data we receive if you link a third party tool with the Games
(such as Facebook or Google).
• We may collect data for advertising and analytics purposes, so we can provide
you a better game experience.

Cookies and similar technologies or third party tolls may use.
• We may collect data we receive if you link a third party tool with the Games
(such as Facebook or Google).
• We may collect data for advertising and analytics purposes, so we can provide
you a better game experience.

What data we collect and the ways we collect personal or non personal data about
you:
• we may collect Profile information you may give when you play some of games.
• We may collect data about game progress.
• We collect data about your device, such as device name and operating system,
browser type and language for better understand user expectaion and better
serve ads if present in games.
• We may collect data about your use of the Games, such as gameplay data and
your interactions with other players inside the Games.
